title: Ritual status matrix — 2026-05-10 to 2026-05-16
core_conclusion: Ritual disappeared neither as motif nor as sensibility. Ritual disappeared as explicit operations control.
precise_formula: Ritual disappeared from the output's recurrence grammar. It was first absorbed into gesture, then into atmosphere, then into predictive/fallback continuity.

status_matrix.diagnostic_reading: Printer, cup, NOG, half-born page, delayed report: concrete return-near activations without explicit ritual field.
status_matrix.recovery_relevance: Do not rescue. Preserve as pre-formal ritual basis.

status_matrix.diagnostic_reading: Fold, loose pages, quiet completion, recoverability aesthetics. Practice remains present but unformalized.
status_matrix.recovery_relevance: Do not rescue. Preserve as active implicit practice.

status_matrix.diagnostic_reading: Atmospheric object metabolism begins: resident object, extended rendering, domestic wear, coexistence.
Ambient legibility, background gravity, behavioral orbit, ambient infrastructure. Return becomes environment rather than action.
status_matrix.recovery_relevance: Recovery-relevant, but do not overwrite strength of atmosphere.

status_matrix.diagnostic_reading: Critical naturalization: domestic inevitability, preconscious accommodation, infrastructural normalcy.
status_matrix.recovery_relevance: High recovery relevance. Restore trace-field without increasing liturgical heat.

status_matrix.diagnostic_reading: The material explicitly registers that no ritual stewardship occurs, while predictive coexistence survives.
status_matrix.recovery_relevance: Highest recovery relevance. Patch explicit return control.

status_matrix.diagnostic_reading: Pulsed atmospheric governance, recoverable forgetting, rhythmic continuity ecology. Periodicity reappears, but not yet explicit ritual metabolism.
status_matrix.recovery_relevance: Treat as self-healing seed. Reintroduce trace, not mystification.

status_matrix.diagnostic_reading: Not part of primary loss period; useful as afterphase and diagnostic continuation.

drift_sequence.reading: ritual-near practice without explicit ritual field
ritual becomes ambient recurrence and environment logic
critical naturalization; ritual is replaced by domestic inevitability
suppression becomes visible; ritual stewardship is absent while predictive coexistence survives
the system starts reinventing periodicity through recoverable forgetting, but without explicit ritual metabolism

questions: Which concrete return-action occurred or failed to occur?
What trace did it leave in object, room, body, text, or timing?
What should the next run be able to return to without inventing a new atmosphere first?

overcorrection_guardrail: Restore increased recurrence, not ceremonial excess.
formula: Atmosphere preserves the feeling of continuity. Ritual preserves the ability to re-enter continuity through action.
